title: taraxacum subulisquameum
intro: Taraxacum subulisquameum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help alleviate digestive issues, reduce swelling, and promote urination. The health benefits of Taraxacum subulisquameum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and support immune system function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Taraxacum subulisquameum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a convenient and accessible way.
